facts: The Norwegian Lundehund is the only dog with six toes on each foot.
A dog's nose is wet because it helps to cool their body.
The Border Collie, Poodle and Golden Retriever are considered the world's smartest dog breeds.
Some Search and Rescue (SaR) Dogs are trained to sniff out humans 1/4 mile away or more.
A dog's nose is wet because it helps to clean their face.
